sql_array: CREATE TABLE rdf_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, content TEXT, uri TEXT);
INSERT INTO rdf_data (id, content, uri) VALUES (1, 'example content with NULL value', 'http://example.org/1');
INSERT INTO rdf_data (id, content, uri) VALUES (2, NULL, 'http://example.org/2');
INSERT INTO rdf_data (id, content, uri) VALUES (3, '', 'http://example.org/3');
SELECT DB.DBA.RDF_LOAD_RDFA(file_to_string(content), uri, 'http://example.org/example') FROM rdf_data WHERE uri IS NOT NULL;
SELECT DB.DBA.RDF_LOAD_RDFA(file_to_string(content), uri, 'http://example.org/example') FROM rdf_data WHERE content IS NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rdf_data WHERE DB.DBA.RDF_LOAD_RDFA(file_to_string(content), uri, 'http://example.org/example') IS NULL;
SELECT id, content FROM rdf_data WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rdf_data AS r2 WHERE r2.uri IS NULL) > 0;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rdf_data GROUP BY uri HAVING COUNT(content) IS NULL;

SELECT r1.id, DB.DBA.RDF_LOAD_RDFA(file_to_string(r1.content), r1.uri, 'http://example.org/example') IS NULL AS load_status FROM rdf_data AS r1 JOIN rdf_data AS r2 ON r1.uri = r2.uri WHERE r2.content IS NULL;

SELECT uri, DB.DBA.RDF_LOAD_RDFA(file_to_string(content), uri, 'http://example.org/example') FROM rdf_data WHERE uri IS NOT NULL ORDER BY DB.DBA.RDF_LOAD_RDFA(file_to_string(content), uri, 'http://example.org/example') IS NULL DESC;
